feats.name: Mule-Born
feats.description: Years of labor have hardened your body. Gain +2 maximum HP. When performing extended physical labor, you do not tire as quickly as others. Once per rest, reroll a failed Strength or Constitution check.

feats.name: Harvest Sense
feats.description: You instinctively understand weather, crops, and the land. Gain Advantage on checks involving farming, weather, or identifying unhealthy land. You can usually tell when something in nature feels wrong.

feats.name: Stubborn Stock
feats.description: You refuse to stay down. The first time you would become exhausted each day, ignore it. Once per combat, reduce incoming damage by 1.

feats.name: Quick Wit
feats.description: You always have something to say. Once per encounter, reroll a failed Charisma check. After a few minutes of conversation, most people remember you fondly.

feats.name: Fool's Courage
feats.description: You laugh in situations that should terrify you. Gain Advantage against fear effects.

feats.name: Tavern Soul
feats.description: You know how to make strangers feel like friends. During rests, allies recover additional morale or stress. You can usually find rumors, gossip, or local trouble in any settlement.

feats.name: Mocking Tongue
feats.description: Your words cut deeper than blades sometimes. Once per combat, distract an enemy with a taunt. If successful, they suffer disadvantage on their next action.

feats.name: Waysinger
feats.description: You carry songs, stories, and legends between settlements. People are naturally more willing to shelter or feed you. Once per session, recall a useful legend or historical detail.

feats.name: Painter of Moments
feats.description: You notice beauty others overlook. Gain Advantage when observing details, emotions, or subtle changes. After studying a place or person, you may ask the GM one question about them.

feats.name: Dancing Footwork
feats.description: Years of performance taught you balance and movement. Gain Advantage on checks involving balance or graceful movement. Once per combat, reposition a short distance without provoking reactions.

feats.name: Silver String
feats.description: Your music carries emotion unnaturally well. Once per scene, calm a frightened or angered individual through performance. Some claim your songs linger longer than they should.

feats.name: Village Healer
feats.description: You know old remedies, stitching, and herbal care. During rests, allies recover additional HP. You may stabilize dying characters without a roll. Gain Advantage when treating sickness or wounds.

feats.name: Gentle Hands
feats.description: People instinctively trust your care. Calm frightened individuals more easily. Once per session, remove panic or emotional distress from an ally through conversation or care.

feats.name: Bone-Setter
feats.description: You've treated hard injuries before. Broken limbs and major injuries heal faster under your care. Once per combat, reduce the severity of an ally's wound.

feats.name: Herbwise
feats.description: You know the language of roots, leaves, and old brews. You can identify useful or dangerous plants. During travel, you may gather herbs to create simple remedies.

feats.name: Trailborn
feats.description: You were shaped by long roads, cold mornings, and silent forests. Gain Advantage on tracking, navigation, and identifying signs of creatures or danger. During travel, your group moves more quietly and is less likely to become lost. Once per rest, reroll a failed Survival or Awareness check.
